name: skylit-dev-io
description: VS Code/Cursor extension for instant WordPress Gutenberg sync. Solves WP Cron unreliability on local development. Requires Skylit.DEV WordPress plugin.

commands.title: Skylit: Scan for WordPress
Skylit: Connect to WordPress
Skylit: Disconnect
Skylit: Setup Auth Token
Skylit: Sync Current File
Skylit: Push All Media to WordPress
Skylit: Import All Media from WordPress
Skylit: Full Media Sync (bidirectional)
Skylit: Show Menu
Skylit: Convert Post Type (for moved folders)
Skylit: Request WordPress ID (create post for folder)
Skylit: Manage Post (change status, slug, title, schedule)
Skylit: Delete Post (trash or permanently delete)
Skylit: Connect to Remote WordPress
Skylit: Sync All Posts from Remote
Skylit: Relocate Dev Folder (move to local or another location)
Skylit: Open in Gutenberg
Skylit: Repair Block Metadata
Skylit: Repair Blocks (force re-import current page)
Skylit: Repair CSS Storage (current page in DB)
Skylit: Repair CSS Storage (all posts, batched)
Skylit: Repair All Posts (clear sync hashes)
Skylit: Manage Sites (view, switch, remove paired domains)
Skylit: Switch Site (change active WordPress connection)
Skylit: Settings

skylit.autoConnect.description: Automatically connect when WordPress is detected in workspace

skylit.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay for file changes in milliseconds (prevent rapid sync on every keystroke)

skylit.cursorTracking.description: Sync IDE cursor position with Gutenberg block selection

skylit.siteUrl.description: WordPress site URL (workspace-scoped). Auto-detected from wp-config.php if empty. Required for remote dev folder mode. NOTE: Should be set per-workspace, not globally.

skylit.localDevPath.description: Local dev folder path for remote mode. When set with siteUrl, enables remote dev folder (WordPress runs elsewhere, files stay local).

skylit.debugOutput.description: Enable debug output in the Output panel (useful for troubleshooting)

skylit.debugProfile.description: Log process/timing/resource usage (which process, duration ms, heap). Enable with debugOutput to see exact picture of what consumes what and why.

skylit.gutenbergJumpPreserveFocus.description: When true, Gutenberg jump-to-line updates the HTML tab and cursor position without moving keyboard focus (e.g. keeps focus in Cursor/VS Code chat or terminal). Disable to always focus the editor on jump (legacy behavior).

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
